judge_reason: Description B claims specific, legible stamped text (e.g., 'RECD-COMM & COURS FBI') while Description A states the text is largely illegible or faintly visible, indicating a direct contradiction on the readability of the same visual elements.
original_image_tags: A scanned image of the reverse side of a yellowed, aged document page. Two dark, irregular holes or punched holes are visible near the top center. The paper shows signs of aging and wear.
Handwritten or stamped text, partially obscured and faint.
Faint, reversed text from the opposite side of the page is visible through the paper. The text is largely illegible due to the bleed-through effect, appearing as a mirror image.
A series of stamped dates and times, oriented vertically along the left margin.
A series of stamps, oriented horizontally at the bottom of the page.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A faded, yellowed scanned document page with faint mirrored text showing through and several dark punch-hole/tear marks near the top edge; no distinct photograph or diagram is visible.*
